principal.responsibility: Selected and implemented the discriminator, replayed prerequisites, wrote both encodings and the independent audit, executed all proof checks, interpreted scope, and updated durable state.

delegates.use: Advisory route selection and failure-mode checklist; every relied-on claim was independently checked.
Advisory encoding sizes, duplicate-origin sentinel, controls, and resource stops; Sol independently implemented and audited them.

evidence_rule: Delegate agreement was not treated as evidence. Deterministic source hashes, dual raw-origin encodings, SAT certificates, LRAT checking, full K5 scans, and mutation controls are the evidence.
